title: Proclamation No. 600, s. 1940
text:
MALACAÑAN PALACE MANILA

PROCLAMATION NO. 600

EXCLUDING FROM THE OPERATION OF PROCLAMATION NO. 427, DATED NOVEMBER 7, 1931, AND RESERVING FOR WAREHOUSE PURPOSES A PARCEL OF LAND SITUATED IN THE POBLACION, MUNICIPALITY OF SANTIAGO, PROVINCE OF ISABELA, ISLAND OF LUZON.

Upon the recommendation of the Secretary of Agriculture and Commerce, I hereby exclude from the operation of Proclamation Numbered Four hundred twenty-seven, dated November seven, nineteen hundred and thirty-one, and reserve for warehouse purposes, under the administration of the National Warehousing Corporation, subject to private rights, if any there be, the following parcel of land situated in the Poblacion, municipality of Santiago, Province of Isabela, and more particularly described in Bureau of Lands plan Mr-136-Amd., to wit:

Lot No. 1-A. —A parcel of land (lot No. 1-A of the amendment-subdivision plan Mr-136-Amd., being a portion of lot No. 1 described on plan Mr-136, G. L. E. O. Record No. ), situated in the Poblacion, municipality of Santiago, province of Isabela. Bounded on the NE. by road; on the SE., SW., and NW., by lot No. 1-B of the amendment-subdivision plan. Beginning at a point marked “1” on plan, being N. 15° 10′ E., 602.53 m., more or less, from B. L. L. M. No. 78, Santiago Cad. No. 211, thence S. 66° 43′ W., 158.93 m. to point “2”; thence N. 41° 39′ W. 200.65 m. to point “3”; thence N. 75° 35′ E., 174.96 m. to point ”4”; thence N. 75° 26′ E., 5.77 m. to point “5”: thence S. 40° 36′ E., 87.60 m. to point “6”; thence S. 41° 02′ E., 82.52 m. to point “7”; thence S.64° 04’ W., 7.71 m. to the point of beginning; containing an area of twenty-nine thousand six hundred forty-six (29,646) square meters, more or less. All points referred to are indicated on the plan; and on the ground, points “6” and “7” are marked by old B. L. concrete monuments; and the rest, by B. L. concrete monuments; bearings true; declination 0° 27′ E.; date of the original survey. July 6, 11, 12 and October 11, 1927 and that of the amendment-subdivision survey, December 9 and 10, 1939.

NOTE:

Lot No. 1-A = lot No. 7999 of Santiago Cad. No. 211, Case No. 1.

In witness whereof, I have hereunto set my hand and caused the seal of the Commonwealth of the Philippines to be affixed.

Done at the City of Manila, this fifth day of August, in the year of Our Lord, nineteen hundred and forty, and of the Commonwealth of the Philippines, the fifth.

MANUEL L. QUEZON President of the Philippines

By the President: JORGE B. VARGAS Secretary to the President

Source: Presidential Museum and Library
